data.title: Bitcoin Miners WULF and MARA Trade at 4× Revenue Premiums, IREN Lags
data.description:
On-chain data firm CryptoQuant has identified the Bitcoin addresses of listed miners and has derived intra-month revenue for MARA, WULF, RIOT, HIVE, CORZ, CLSK, BITF, CIPHER and IREN. Annualised figures place WULF and MARA on 4. 4× revenue multiples, while IREN trades at a discount.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-miner-premiums-wulf-mara-iren-discount/

data.title: Dubai Government Announces Partnership With Crypto.com To Accept Payments in Digital Assets
data.description:
Dubai is partnering with the exchange Crypto. com to accept digital assets for government fees. The emirate’s Department of Finance (DOF) signed the memorandum of understanding (MoU) with the crypto firm as part of its ongoing “cashless strategy. ” Dubai aims to conduct more than 90% of financial transactions across both the public and private sectors through […] The post Dubai Government Announces Partnership With Crypto
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/14/dubai-government-announces-partnership-with-crypto-com-to-accept-payments-in-digital-assets/

data.title: JPMorgan Chase Settles First Transaction on Public Blockchain Using Chainlink (LINK) and Ondo Finance (ONDO): Report
data.description:
The biggest bank in the US is expanding its foray into digital assets and is now reportedly settling blockchain transactions outside of its proprietary networks. JPMorgan Chase has announced that it has settled its first transaction on a public ledger using oracle service Chainlink (LINK) and tokenization-focused platform Ondo Finance (ONDO), Fortune reports.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/14/jpmorgan-chase-settles-first-transaction-on-public-blockchain-using-chainlink-link-and-ondo-finance-ondo-report/

data.title: Price predictions 5/14: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, SUI, LINK, AVAX
data.description:
Key points:Bitcoin remains above $100,000, but buyers are struggling to sustain prices above $105,000. Strong altcoin performances suggest an altseason has started. Bitcoin (BTC) is trading above $103,000, with buyers attempting to drive the price to the all-time high of $109,588. Research firm Santiment said in a post on X that Bitcoin whales and sharks, holding 10 to 10,000 Bitcoin, accumulated 83,105 Bitcoin in the past 30 days, suggesting that “it may be a matter of time” before Bitcoin's all-time high is taken out
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/price-predictions-5-14-btc-eth-xrp-bnb-sol-doge-ada-sui-link-avax?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Tether Reveals QVAC: A Privacy-First Platform for AI Agents and Bitcoin Payments
data.description:
TL;DR Tether introduced QVAC, a platform that runs AI applications locally on user devices, without relying on servers or cloud infrastructure. QVAC’s modular architecture enables peer-to-peer connections and protects sensitive data by removing intermediaries from the process. It will integrate native payments in Bitcoin and USDt through WDK, allowing AI agents to handle transactions without.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/tether-reveals-qvac-a-privacy-first-platform-for-ai-agents-and-bitcoin-payments/

data.title: XRP Lawsuit: What The May 8th SEC Settlement Really Means for Ripple and XRP
data.description:
On March 8th, the SEC announced that it had reached a settlement agreement with Ripple. The cryptocurrency firm is asked to pay $50 million, a massive drop from the initial $125 million fine. Once accepted, the settlement, which is currently awaiting approval from the District Court Judge Analisa Torres, will bring Ripple an inch closer […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/xrp-lawsuit-what-the-may-8th-sec-settlement-really-means-for-ripple-and-xrp/
